title: PJM Solar Forecast Hourly CSV download
description:
Hourly solar power forecast within PJM

The hourly power forecast within PJM area for metered- utility scale solar power
and behind the meter solar power such as residential solar panels. Behind The Meter
(BTM) solar power is aggregated and handled through Load Serving Entities (LSE),
not directly through PJM. The forecast is updated every hour and is available for
the next 48 hours.
